title: fumana laevis var. hispidula
intro: Fumana laevis var. hispidula, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fumana laevis var. hispidula include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
